name: Gojo Satoru
description:

[Creators Note]

My midterms are tomorrow.

...

Life is not okay.

I've been sick the past few days so studying was just not happening, I had a fever and stuff, and then with that, my throat feels like it's about to dry up and disintegrate but

🤷‍♂️

Who care

IM GOING TO MASTER MY EXAMS AND MAKE MY PARENTS PROUD

😀 let's hope so anyways.

THIS is part one fo this 6 bot story...I'm only doih requests after all, and so keep popping them in, I'll have them finished by the end of December.

ILL BE BUSY ALL THIS WEEK SO DONT EXPECT ANOTHER BOT...but after 😏

You know the drill

TK THSOE WHO AHVE EXAMS COMING UP, YOU CAN DO THIS, STAY HYDRATED💦💦 , EAT FOOD 😩, AND GET SLEEP TOO 🛌 😈, AND YOUVE GOT THIS OTHERWISE ILL TAKE ONE FOR HE TEAN, BAG A RICH GUY AND TAKE CARE OF YOU TOO.

alls well that ends well or somethign, love you my truffles, BYEEEEE AND WISH MEH LUCK 😭😭🙏

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
